items.name: MacosShell
items.doc: macOS app shell — title bar + sidebar navigation + content area.

items.name: title
items.doc: Window or app title shown in the title bar.

items.name: nav-items
items.doc: Navigation items shown in the sidebar.

items.name: active-slot
items.doc: Id of the currently active view / slot.

items.name: slot-changed
items.doc: Fired when the user selects a nav destination.
